name: Kobi-Batata Shaak
recipeIngredient: 2 and 1/2 cups Potatoes, cut into 3/4-inch pieces
1 cup Shredded green cabbage (or up to twice as much)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add cumin or mustard seeds to the hot oil.
3. Cook until seeds turn golden brown (cumin) or gray (mustard) and release their aroma, about 1 minute. Seeds will pop as they cook; watch closely to avoid burning.
4. Add potatoes to the skillet. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and continue cooking for 15 minutes. Stir occasionally to prevent sticking.
5. Add cabbage and continue cooking until vegetables are semi-tender. Add spices and stir to evenly coat the vegetables. Cook until vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes.
6. Stir in cilantro, lemon juice, and tomatoes. Serve immediately.
Makes 2 to 3 servings
Calories per serving: 154 Grams of fat: 5% Fat calories: 29 Cholesterol: 0 mg Grams of Fiber: 2.5
